scripts.android:bundle:debug: node scripts/ensure-android-assets.js && react-native bundle --platform android --dev true --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res/
scripts.android:bundle:release: node scripts/ensure-android-assets.js && react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/build/intermediates/res/merged/release/
scripts.clean: node scripts/gradle.cjs clean --no-build-cache && npx react-native start --reset-cache
scripts.clean:all: npx --yes rimraf@6 node_modules android/.gradle android/.gradle-user-home android/build android/app/build android/app/.cxx && yarn install && node scripts/android-wipe-native-cache.js && node scripts/gradle.cjs clean --no-build-cache && npx react-native start --reset-cache
scripts.bundle-reset: node scripts/ensure-android-assets.js && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.release: node scripts/gradle.cjs assembleRelease --no-build-cache --rerun-tasks && node scripts/open-android-output.cjs apk
scripts.bundleRelease: node scripts/gradle.cjs bundleRelease --no-build-cache --rerun-tasks && node scripts/open-android-output.cjs aab
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/gradle.cjs clean --no-build-cache && npm run android:bundle:release && npm run release && npm run bundleRelease
scripts.build:prodApk: node scripts/gradle.cjs clean --no-build-cache && npm run android:bundle:release && npm run release
scripts.build:android:clean: node scripts/android-wipe-native-cache.js && node scripts/react-native-android.cjs build-android --tasks clean --extra-params "--no-build-cache"
scripts.build:android:prod: node scripts/android-wipe-native-cache.js && node scripts/react-native-android.cjs build-android --tasks clean --extra-params "--no-build-cache" && node scripts/react-native-android.cjs build-android --tasks bundleRelease --extra-params "--no-build-cache" && node scripts/react-native-android.cjs build-android --tasks assembleRelease --extra-params "--no-build-cache"
